description: CompositionBlack T-shirt for men made of 100% polyester, has a round neckline, short sleeves, chest placket, white panel detailing on the sides and on the shoulders and nike tag on the left chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsGet casual with comfort in this T-shirt from nike. The polyester fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable during fun times with friends, while the brand logo adds style. Pair this tee with your favourite denims and sports shoes.
